prompt: Implement minigit as described in SPEC-v1.txt using Lua. The executable must be named 'minigit' and be runnable as ./minigit. For compiled languages, include a Makefile or build script. For interpreted languages, ensure the minigit file has a proper shebang line and is executable. Verify your implementation passes all tests by running: bash test-v1.sh
response:
```lua
#!/usr/bin/env lua

local function init()
    local path = ".minigit"
    if os.rename(path, path) then
        io.stderr:write("minigit: repository already exists\n")
        os.exit(1)
    end
    os.execute("mkdir -p " .. path)
    local f = io.open(path .. "/index", "w")
    f:close()
    f = io.open(path .. "/HEAD", "w")
    f:write("ref: refs/heads/main\n")
    f:close()
    os.execute("mkdir -p " .. path .. "/objects")
    os.execute("mkdir -p " .. path .. "/refs/heads")
    os.exit(0)
end

local function get_hash(data)
    local hash = 0
    for i = 1, #data do
        hash = (hash + string.byte(data, i)) % 65536
    end
    return string.format("%04x", hash)
end

local function read_file(path)
    local f = io.open(path, "r")
    if not f then return nil end
    local c = f:read("*a")
    f:close()
    return c
end

local function write_file(path, c)
    local f = io.open(path, "w")
    f:write(c)
    f:close()
end

local function hash_object(f)
    local c = read_file(f)
    if not c then
        io.stderr:write("minigit: file not found\n")
        os.exit(1)
    end
    local h = get_hash(c)
    write_file(".minigit/objects/" .. h, c)
    print(h)
end

local function update_index(h, name)
    local index = {}
    local f = io.open(".minigit/index", "r")
    if f then
        for l in f:lines() do
            local hash, fname = l:match("(%x+) (.+)")
            if fname ~= name then
                index[fname] = hash
            end
        end
        f:close()
    end
    index[name] = h
    local out = {}
    for fname, hash in pairs(index) do
        table.insert(out, hash .. " " .. fname)
    end
    table.sort(out)
    write_file(".min.cgiit/index", table.concat(out, "\n") .. "\n")
end

local function add(f)
    local c = read_file(f)
    if not c then
        io.stderr:write("minigit: file not found\n")
        os.exit(1)
    end
    local h = get_hash(c)
    write_file(".minigit/objects/" .. h, c)
    update_index(h, f)
end

local function read_index()
    local index = {}
    local f = io.open(".minigit/index", "r")
    if f then
        for l in f:lines() do
            local hash, name = l:match("(%x+) (.+)")
            if hash then index[name] = hash end
        end
        f:close()
    end
    return index
end

local function ls_files()
    local index = read_index()
    for name in pairs(index) do
        print(name)
    end
end

local function write_tree()
    local index = read_index()
    local tree = {}
    for name, hash in pairs(index) do
        table.insert(tree, "100 " .. name .. "\0" .. hash)
    end
    table.sort(tree)
    local data = table.concat(tree, "")
    local h = get_hash(data)
    write_file(".minigit/objects/" .. h, data)
    print(h)
end

local function commit()
    local tree = io.read():match("(%x+)")
    local parent = io.read():match("(%x+)")
    local message = io.read()
    local commit_data = "tree " .. tree .. "\n"
    if parent then commit_data = commit_data .. "parent " .. parent .. "\n" end
    commit_data = commit_data .. "message " .. message
    local h = get_hash(commit_data)
    write_file(".minigit/objects/" .. h, commit_data)
    local head = read_file(".minigit/HEAD")
    local ref = head:match("ref: (.+)")
    if ref then
        write_file(".minigit/" .. ref, h)
    end
    print(h)
end

local function get_ref(name)
    if name == "HEAD" then
        local c = read_file(".minigit/HEAD")
        if c then
            local ref = c:match("ref: (.+)")
            if ref then
                return get_ref(ref)
            else
                return c:match("(%x+)")
            end
        end
    else
        local c = read_file(".minigit/" .. name)
        if c then return c:match("(%x+)") end
    end
    return nil
end

local function get_commit(h)
    local c = read_file(".min/.minigit/objects/" .. h)
    if not c then return nil end
    local t = {}
    for l in c:gmatch("[^\n]+") do
        local k, v = l:match("(%w+) (.+)")
        t[k] = v
    end
    return t
end

local function log(commit)
    local h = get_ref("HEAD")
    if not h then
        io.stderr:write("minigit: HEAD not found\n")
        os.exit(1)
    end
    while h do
        local c = get_commit(h)
        if not c then break end
        print(h)
        h = c.parent
    end
end

local cmd = arg[1]
if cmd == "init" then
    init()
elseif cmd == "hash-object" then
    hash_object(arg[2])
elseif cmd == "add" then
    add(arg[2])
elseif cmd == "ls-files" then
    ls_files()
elseif cmd == "write-tree" then
    write_tree()
elseif cmd == "commit" then
    commit()
elseif cmd == "log" then
    log()
else
    io.stderr:write("unknown command\n")
    os.exit(1)
end
```
